info.title: Rudraganga — Astrology & Wellness Platform API
info.description:
Backend API for the Flutter apps (end-user + astrologer) and the admin panel.

**Envelope:** every response is `{ "success": true, "data": ... }` on success, or `{ "success": false, "message": "...", "errors": [...] }` on failure.

**Auth:** send `Authorization: Bearer <accessToken>`. Tokens come from `POST /api/auth/verify-otp`; refresh with `POST /api/auth/refresh` (refreshToken in body — no cookies). Realtime is Socket.io with the same JWT in `handshake.auth.token`.

post.summary: Send a WhatsApp OTP to a phone number
Verify OTP and receive access + refresh tokens
Start a call/chat/video session (rings astrologer for 60s)
